category_sources: source_facts.description says short-read polishing tool for long-read assemblies; official GitHub README at https://github.com/rrwick/Polypolish describes polishing genome assemblies with short reads.
display_name_sources: Official repository and wiki use Polypolish: https://github.com/rrwick/Polypolish and https://github.com/rrwick/Polypolish/wiki.
docs_sources: Official README directs users to the Polypolish wiki for installation, usage, and explanations: https://github.com/rrwick/Polypolish/wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/rrwick/Polypolish, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe short-read polishing of long-read genome assemblies; source_facts.executables lists polypolish.
